zh.lifeSummary: William I Malet於1022年出生在法國諾門迪。他和Esilia Crispin至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他於1065年被列為one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror。他去世於1071年在英國林可爾史爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.Graville St. Honorine, Haute-Normandie,: 法国豪-諾門迪瑟-馬利格拉維爾
zh-hans.Isle of Ely, England: 英国易斯爾 本 埃利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: William I Malet于1022年出生在法国諾門迪。他和Esilia Crispin至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他于1065年被列为one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror。他去世于1071年在英国林可爾史爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Malet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname from a diminutive of Mal ‘bad’ or from a derivative of the related Old French word maleit ‘accursed’ (see Mallet 1). Compare Malette .
French: from the Old French personal name Malet, a pet form of Malo (compare Mallet 2).

variants.name: Mal
meanings: Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, from mal ‘small, little’.

variants.name: Malette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gaston, Alphonse, Francois, Jacques, Rejean, Serge.
French: variant or feminine form of Malet and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: William I Malet was born in 1022, in Normandy, France. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Esilia Crispin. In 1065, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror. He died in 1071, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: William I Malet est né en 1022, à Normandie, France. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Esilia Crispin. En 1065, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror. Il est décédé en 1071, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: William I Malet wurde 1022 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren. Er hatte mit Esilia Crispin mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1065, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror aufgeführt. Er starb 1071 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: William I Malet è nato il nel 1022 nel Normandie, Francia. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Esilia Crispin. Nel 1065, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror. Morì nel 1071, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William I Maletは1022年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた。彼はEsilia Crispinとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。1065年，45歳の時，職業はone of the generals and companions of william the conquerorと記録されている。彼は1071年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William I Malet(은)는 1022년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났다. 그는 Esilia Crispin(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1065년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror이었다. 그는 1071년 영국 링코실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William I Malet nasceu em 1022, em Normandie, França. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Esilia Crispin. Em 1065, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror. Ele faleceu em 1071, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: William I Malet родился в 1022 г. в местности норманди, Франция. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Esilia Crispin. В 1065 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror. Он умер в 1071 г. в местности линколншир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: William I Malet nació en 1022, en Normandie, Francia. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Esilia Crispin. En 1065, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era one of the generals and companions of william the conqueror. Murió en 1071, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
